headline: KKR Strikes A Multibillion-Dollar Deal As Its Industrial Strategy Advances
summary: With a forward P/E ratio of 12.83, KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) is among the 10 Best Growth Stocks to Buy with Low P/E Ratios. On May 21, KKR & Co. Inc. (NYSE:KKR) and CIRCOR International announced a definitive agreement to sell CIRCOR Aerospace to Parker Hannifin Corporation for $2.55 billion. KKR originally acquired CIRCOR for $1.8 […]
